plot_frame_box.description: Plot region bounded by leftmost data column (col 70.5 ~ year 1770) and rightmost data column (col 752.6 ~ year 2023); top row 110.5 (y=80), bottom row 532.8 (y=0). OWID chart has no visible axis box; bounds derived from tick-label calibration.

worked_example.scenario: Convert data point (year=1900, life_expectancy=40) to pixel coords
worked_example.verification: Pixel (421, 321) lies near label '40 years' tick position and on the visible line crossings near year 1900; confirmed within ±1 px of detected x-tick label center for 1900 (px 421) and y-tick label center for 40 (row 321.5).

detection_internals.x_tick_exclusion_reason: Endpoint labels (1770, 2023) are nudged inward by OWID renderer to avoid clipping outside chart bounds; using them in the linear fit biased px/year by ~5 px. Fit was anchored on the five interior labels (1800,1850,1900,1950,2000) which lie on true tick positions.
detection_internals.axis_box_note: OWID chart has no rectangular axis frame; the only structural feature is a single horizontal rule at row 532 (the x-axis baseline). Plot extent inferred from interior-tick linear fit extrapolated to first/last labels.
detection_internals.calibration_method: Detect x and y tick label digit clusters via dark-pixel CC analysis; linear-fit pixel-to-data using interior ticks only (endpoint labels are anchor-shifted).
